task_completion.description: Navigate to the billing or payment posting section in OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR interface shows the 'Fees' menu expanded with 'Posting', 'Payment', or 'Batch Payments' selected, or the Payment/Posting screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Search for and select patient Jayson Fadel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Jayson Fadel' or 'Fadel, Jayson' appears in the patient search bar, the active patient display, or the payment allocation header.

task_completion.description: Enter the payment amount of $85.00 against the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '85.00' or '85' is visible in a field labeled 'Payment', 'Paid', 'Amount', or similar.
The value '15.00' or '15' is visible in a field labeled 'Adj', 'Adjustment', 'Write-off', or similar.
The text 'EOB2024-7834' is visible in a field labeled 'Check No', 'Ref', 'Reference', or 'Check Number'.

task_completion.description: Save the transaction and confirm the balance is cleared.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Saved' success message is visible, or the encounter row shows a remaining balance of '0.00', or the payment is listed in the history.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenEMR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR web application in a browser window, not a command line or database terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the form fields rather than pasting a summary.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the specific values (85.00, 15.00, EOB2024-7834) present in the corresponding input fields.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from the actual software, not a text editor simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard OpenEMR UI elements (headers, sidebars, buttons) consistent with the application style.
